form.formComment: Resumes after five months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at this track in the G2 October 25 over 4100m. First up last campaign 4 of 12 starters at this track in the G3 October 2 over 3800m, slow track; 10 len behind Celtic Warrior with 70kg at $25. Confidence might be low and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after four months favourite; tracked on the speed and boxed on to post a big 5 len win. Bordeaux on March 10 over 3900m defeating Georgian Star carrying 73kg at $1.40 in a hurdle. Previously second-up pulled up at Auteuil in the G1 on November 15 over 4800m. Warrants thought.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming came from midfield to post a big 4.5 len win. Fontainebleau on February 21 over 3800m slow track defeating Asta La Pasta with 69kg at $5.20 in a hurdle. Second-up finished second of 10 runners at this track on March 11 over 3850m, 3.5 len behind Kyrov with 69kg at $8.30. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after four months finished fourth of 10 runners at this track on March 11 over 3850m, 16 len behind Kyrov with 72kg at $2.60. Previously second-up finished second of 7 runners at Auteuil on October 23 over 3600m, 0.8 len behind Alcyone Rouge carrying 68kg at $1.60. Second-up form sound with three wins and two placings from six runs.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation 2 in a small field at Pisa in the LR January 25 over 3500m, in the wet; 1.3 len behind Winstonpresident with 68kg at $8.63. When resuming last campaign 2 of 9 runners at Erbray July 6 over 3800m, 16 len behind Blade with 67kg. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Resuming today after about 18 months. Finished off last preparation 2 of 7 runners at Auteuil in the G1 November 24 2024 over 3900m, in the wet; 9 len behind Kingland with 67kg at $15. Previously first up; 2 in a small field at this track October 3 2024 over 3600m, 6 len behind Celty Du Kalon carrying 67.5kg at $4.10. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing settled back and ran on when finished sixth of 10 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3800m, on slow going 15 len behind Inner Success carrying 68kg at $5.20. At only start last preparation ran last at this track in the LR on September 10 over 3800m, on slow going 24 len behind Celtic Warrior with 70kg at $18. Looks tested in this line-up and others preferred.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after four months finished fifth of 7 starters at Auteuil in the LR on March 14 over 4400m, on a wet track; 55 len behind Lauthentyko carrying 70kg at $9. Previously second-up lost his rider at this track in the G2 on October 25 over 4100m. Fitter again but this looks too tough.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months. Finished off last preparation 4 of 12 runners at Auteuil in the G1 November 16 over 5500m, 10 len behind Toscana Du Berlais with 68kg at $4.80. form.formComment: Second-up today. Freshened for 51 days. Fresh up after two months came from midfield; finished second in a small field at Auteuil in the G3 on February 14 over 4400m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Kilometre Illimite carrying 66kg at $3.20. Previously second-up won by 8 len Auteuil in a LR on November 5 over 4400m defeating Lacokokeldy carrying 66kg at $6.80 in a steeplechase. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.
